CustomField.formula: CASE(Number_Of_Days_In_Current_Status__c, null, '0-2 Days', 0, '0-2 Days', 1, '0-2 Days', 2, '0-2 Days', 3, '3-5 Days', 4, '3-5 Days', 5, '3-5 Days', 6, '5-10 Days', 7, '5-10 Days', 8, '5-10 Days', 9, '5-10 Days', 10, '5-10 Days', '10+ Days' )
CustomField.label: Insolvencies in Queue
